title: Castlevania: Symphony of the Night
platform_style_description: PlayStation-inspired pixel art, moody lighting, low-poly-era color language, and strong late-90s contrast translated into crisp pixels
main_subject: a lone pale swordsman silhouette in a long coat
environment: a moonlit castle hall with one towering gothic window and drifting mist
action_mood_cue: standing still in eerie confidence before moving deeper into the castle
composition: single swordsman only, one giant window, one moon glow, sparse stone detail, and strong late-90s pixel mood
memory_hook: castle solitude, elegant darkness, and a single iconic moonlit interior
legal_watchouts: avoid exact coat and hair details
legal_notes: Risk level: high. Use generic archetypes, avoid franchise-identifiable costume or symbol language, and preserve recognizability through atmosphere, scene memory, and gameplay cues only.
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Action-RPG game.

A lone pale swordsman silhouette in a long coat in a moonlit castle hall with one towering gothic window and drifting mist, standing still in eerie confidence before moving deeper into the castle.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- PlayStation-inspired pixel art, moody lighting, low-poly-era color language, and strong late-90s contrast translated into crisp pixels
- always rendered as pixel art
- crisp pixel edges, readable sprite-like shading, and controlled dithering when useful
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- gothic, elegant, ominous

Composition:
- single swordsman only, one giant window, one moon glow, sparse stone detail, and strong late-90s pixel mood
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- pixel art only
- no text
- no watermark
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Alucard likeness, avoid exact coat and hair details, avoid official sword shapes, avoid Dracula iconography, avoid resemblance to castlevania

generation_notes.detail_policy: rich enough to feel desirable, simple enough to read fast
